name: Podcast Studio
short_description: Professional podcast recording studio with broadcast mics, acoustic treatment, and multi-camera video setup.
overview: Record studio-quality audio and video podcasts at DyWix. Our podcast studio features Rode and Shure microphones, sound-treated rooms, multi-camera angles, teleprompter, and on-site technical support for creators across Delhi NCR.
process: Book your slot online or by phone
Export raw files or book edit room

name: Video Production
short_description: Full-service video production studio for commercials, corporate films, and branded content.
overview: From concept to final cut, DyWix video production studio offers professional lighting, cinema cameras, green screen, and dedicated edit suites for brands and agencies in Delhi NCR.

name: Product Photography
short_description: E-commerce and catalog product photography with professional lighting and styling.
overview: High-conversion product photography for Amazon, Flipkart, D2C brands, and catalogs. Infinity coves, macro setups, and lifestyle staging available at our Dwarka studio.

name: Fashion Photography
short_description: Fashion lookbook, editorial, and model photography with makeup room and wardrobe area.
overview: Shoot fashion campaigns, lookbooks, and editorial content with dedicated sets, makeup room, and styling space. Ideal for designers, boutiques, and agencies in Delhi NCR.

name: Corporate Photography
short_description: Headshots, team photos, and corporate event photography for businesses.
overview: Professional corporate photography for annual reports, websites, LinkedIn headshots, and leadership portraits. Fast turnaround for HR and marketing teams.

name: YouTube Studio Rental
short_description: Rent a fully equipped YouTube studio for vlogs, tutorials, and channel content.
overview: YouTube creators get a turnkey studio with multi-camera setup, ring lights, teleprompter, acoustic treatment, and flexible hourly booking — perfect for consistent channel production.

name: Green Screen Studio
short_description: Chroma key green screen studio for virtual backgrounds and VFX-ready footage.
overview: Shoot clean green screen footage for corporate presentations, educational content, and creative VFX. Professional cyc wall with even lighting and spill control.

name: Influencer Studio
short_description: Content creation studio designed for influencers, reels, and social media production.
overview: Create Instagram reels, YouTube shorts, and branded content in a studio built for social media creators. Trending sets, ring lights, and fast turnaround booking.

name: Reel Shoot Studio
short_description: Dedicated studio for Instagram reels, YouTube shorts, and short-form video.
overview: Shoot high-engagement reels and shorts with vertical-optimized lighting, multiple backdrop options, and on-trend aesthetic sets in Dwarka, Delhi.

name: TV Commercial Studio
short_description: Broadcast-quality studio for TV commercials and ad film production.
overview: Produce TV commercials and ad films with cinema-grade equipment, large studio floor, and experienced crew support for agencies and brands.
